message:
feat(bd-5jn): Add multiple file support

Implements the ability to process multiple files in a single invocation:
- CLI now accepts Vec<PathBuf> instead of Option<PathBuf>
- Multiple files: aadc file1.txt file2.txt file3.txt
- Shell globs work: aadc docs/*.md
- Works with -i for in-place editing of multiple files
- Continue on error, report all errors at the end
- Summary output for multiple files in verbose mode
- File headers (==> file <==) when outputting to stdout

Also includes semantic exit codes infrastructure (bd-nci partial):
- Exit code 0: Success
- Exit code 1: General error
- Exit code 2: Invalid arguments
- Exit code 3: Dry-run would change
- Exit code 4: Parse error

Closes: bd-5jn

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
